params.name: Koryeo Seal
params.description: This seal is the symbol of supreme authority in Koryeo! All of the past supreme administrators of Koryeo carried the seal with them so they could use it to sign documents at any time. In the modern world, where traditions are fading away, using the seal is a great way to provoke patriotism.
